message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate unary_ops and unified_int_ops to builder API

Migrates helper functions to use auto-close patterns:
- unary_ops.zig: emitMethodCall, emitNegate, emitLogicalNot,
  emitRuntimeUnary, emitBoolToInt, emitNotToBool
- unified_int_ops.zig: emitUnifiedIntBinaryOp, emitUnifiedIntShiftOp,
  emitComplexBinaryOp, emitAsUnifiedInt
